events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary co-lead vocalist and bassist for The Beatles, turns 84 today.

angles.name: Macca's Milestone
angles.copy: Celebrating a true icon today! What's your favourite McCartney moment, from Beatles classics to his incredible solo career?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice with Yazoo and a successful solo career, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Happy 65th to the incredible Alison Moyet! Her distinctive vocals defined an era. Which track of hers is on repeat for you?

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American music legend Lionel Richie, known for his work with The Commodores and a hugely successful solo career, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Is It 77 You're Looking For?
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! From funk to ballads, his music always hits right. What's your go-to Lionel track?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy, Emmy, and Tony Award-winning artist Cyndi Lauper, famous for her distinctive voice and vibrant style, turns 73 today.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun (at 73)
angles.copy: Happy 73rd to the iconic Cyndi Lauper! A true original whose music and style continue to inspire. What's your favourite Cyndi hit?

events.title: Remembering George Michael, would have been 63
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 63rd birthday of the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who passed away in 2016.

angles.name: A Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His voice and songwriting remain unmatched. What's the George Michael song that means the most to you?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: It's 17 years today since the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who passed away at the age of 50 in 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years on, Michael Jackson's music and influence continue to resonate globally. His legacy as the King of Pop is undeniable. What's your favourite MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles and successful solo artist, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love at 86
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Keep on drumming, Ringo! What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock God at 79
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His guitar riffs are truly out of this world. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, is celebrating his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves at 83
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy, the stage presence, the voice – a true rock 'n' roll legend! What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the US, forever changing the music industry with its 24/7 music video format, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star?
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV burst onto our screens, bringing music videos into our homes. Did video really kill the radio star, or did it just make them bigger?

events.title: 32 years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released 32 years ago today in 1994, propelling the Manchester band to superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your standout track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music and counterculture history, began 57 years ago today in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music (and Mud)
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Which iconic performance defines the festival for you?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: 49 years since Elvis left the building for good. His impact on music and culture is truly immeasurable. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: It's 30 years today since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas in 1996.

angles.name: Remembering a Rap Icon
angles.copy: Three decades on, Tupac Shakur's lyrics and legacy continue to resonate. Remembering a true rap icon today. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who died in London in 1970 at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God Forever
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His innovative guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: 57 years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released 57 years ago today in 1969.

angles.name: Walking Into History
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Power at 75
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock 'n' roll icon Chrissie Hynde! Her attitude and voice are as strong as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman and rock 'n' roll star Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: As You Were, Liam
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite tune featuring his iconic vocals?

events.title: 55 years of John Lennon's 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single 55 years ago today in the US in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine All The People...
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine', a song that still resonates globally. What does this powerful anthem mean to you?

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod, revolutionising portable music, 25 years ago today in 2001.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, it changed how we listened to music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating 64 years since the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or, more importantly, your favourite Bond theme song?
